summary: Good soundboard recording with a standout Help‑Slip‑Franklin’s sequence.
review: The reviewer is clearly partial to the PCC run of April 1984 and notes that this Morris‑derived source sounds noticeably better than their previous version, indicating solid audio quality. The performance shines on the Help > Slip > Franklin’s medley, which they are literally “rippin” at work, making the show a worthwhile listen despite limited detail on other songs.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive 4‑star review praises both the improved recording and the standout Help‑Slip‑Franklin’s performance; limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer upgraded from a previous Morris version, implying clearer and more balanced sound; no specific flaws mentioned.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer highlights this show as a high point of the three‑day PCC run, especially praising the second‑set medley.
